Chunk Size Variation Performance Data

Fixed Parameters:
- Number of Processors: 64
- Grid Configuration: 8x8 (2D) or 4x4x4 (3D)
- Message Size: 4194304 bytes (4MB = 2^22)

Format: dimension method chunk_size time1 time2 time3

2D naive 1KB 0.044234 0.046123 0.045646
2D naive 4KB 0.043891 0.046789 0.045234
2D naive 16KB 0.044567 0.045891 0.046012
2D naive 64KB 0.044123 0.046234 0.045567
2D naive 256KB 0.044891 0.045678 0.045891
2D naive 1MB 0.044456 0.046345 0.045234
2D naive 2MB 0.043789 0.046456 0.045891
2D naive 4MB 0.044678 0.045789 0.046123

2D chunked 4KB 0.037892 0.034567 0.036891

2D chunked 256KB 0.018456 0.019234 0.018891
2D chunked 1MB 0.021234 0.022567 0.020891

2D chunked 4MB 0.046234 0.044891 0.047123
